meanings.definition: a print made from an engraving
a block or plate or other hard surface that has been engraved
making engraved or etched plates and printing designs from them
carve, cut, or etch into a material or surface
examples: engraved the trophy cupt with the winner's
the lovers scratched their names into the bark of the tree
The event engraved itself into her memory

meanings.definition: carve or cut into a block used for printing or print from such a block
carve or cut a design or letters into
examples: engrave the pen with the owner's name
